artifacts.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
HRT Guide Generator
Mission: Generate hormone replacement therapy guide
Generated by: HRTGuideCapability
"""

def generate_hrt_guide():
    """Generate comprehensive HRT clinical guide."""
    guide = """
# Hormone Replacement Therapy (HRT) Guide

## Mission
Generate hormone replacement therapy guide

## Overview
HRT treats symptoms related to hormonal imbalance (e.g. menopausal, endocrine deficiencies).

## Components
- Estrogen
- Progesterone (if uterus present)
- Optional: Testosterone (selected cases)

## Risks
- Thrombosis
- Breast cancer (variable risk)
- Cardiovascular considerations

## Monitoring
- Baseline labs
- Follow-up at 3, 6, 12 months
- Symptom tracking

## Architecture Reference
{"mission": "{\"mission\": \"Generate hormone replacement therapy guide\"}", "components": ["content_generator", "section_builder", "formatter", "publisher"], "architecture_type": "generator_pattern", "tech_stack": {"language": "Python 3.9+", "framework": "None (standard library)", "testing": "pytest", "documentation": "Markdown"}, "design_patterns": ["factory", "singleton", "observer"], "timestamp": "2025-11-23T17:10:11.452088"}
"""
    return guide

if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(generate_hrt_guide())
artifacts.summary: Structured HRT guidance: components, risks, monitoring.
